i = 0 or n = 1: Exactly 0, 1, or any decimal starting with 0
n = 0,1 or i = 0 and f = 1: 0, 1, or a decimal whose fractional digits equal 1 (e.g., 0.1, 0.01)
n = 1 or t != 0 and i = 0,1: Exactly 1, or a non-zero decimal starting with 0 or 1
t = 0 and i % 10 = 1 and i % 100 != 11 o: Ends in 1 but not 11 (including after decimal point)
v = 0 and i % 10 = 1 and i % 100 != 11 o: Ends in 1 but not 11 (including after decimal point)
n % 10 = 0 or n % 100 = 11..19 or v = 2: Ends in 0 or 11–19 (including after decimal point)
n % 10 = 1 and n % 100 != 11 or v = 2 an: Ends in 1 but not 11 (including after decimal point)
i = 1 and v = 0 or i = 0 and v != 0: Exactly 1 (whole number only), or any decimal starting with 0
v != 0 or n = 0 or n != 1 and n % 100 =: 0, any number with decimals, or ends in 01–19 (except 1 itself)
v = 0 and i % 10 = 1 and i % 100 != 11: Ends in 1 but not 11 (whole numbers only)
v = 0 and i % 10 = 2..4 and i % 100 != 1: Ends in 2–4 but not 12–14 (including after decimal point)
Ends in 2–4 but not 12–14 (whole numbers only)
v = 0 and i % 100 = 3..4 or v != 0: Ends in 03 or 04 (whole numbers only), or any number with decimals
Ends in 03 or 04 (including after decimal point)
v = 0 and i != 1 and i % 10 = 0..1 or v: Ends in 0, 1 (not 1 itself), 5–9, or 12–14 (whole numbers only)
n % 10 = 3..4,9 and n % 100 != 10..19,70: Ends in 3, 4, or 9 but not in teens, seventies, or nineties
n % 100 = 2,22,42,62,82 or n % 1000 = 0: Ends in 02, 22, 42, 62, 82, or large multiples of 1000
n != 2 and n % 10 = 2..9 and n % 100 !=: Not 2, ends in 2–9, not in teens
